languages.text: Эоганн хочет подвести итоги эксперимента — он попросил Вольного Торговца отыскать его на мостике.
Eogunn wants to discuss the results of the experiment — he has asked the Rogue Trader to seek him out on the bridge.
languages.original_text: Эоганн хочет подвести итоги эксперимента — он попросил Вольного Торговца отыскать его на мостике.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn wants to discuss the results of the experiment — he has asked the Rogue Trader to seek him out on the bridge.
Eogunn wants to discuss the results of the experiment — he has asked the Rogue Trader to seek him out on the bridge.
Eogunn wants to discuss the results of the experiment — he has asked the Rogue Trader to seek him out on the bridge.

languages.text: エオガンは実験の結果について話し合いたいと考えている。彼はローグトレーダーに、自分がブリッジにいることを伝えてほしいと頼んだ。
languages.original_text: Eogunn wants to discuss the results of the experiment — he has asked the Rogue Trader to seek him out on the bridge.

traits.locale_text: エゴーンは実験の結果について話し合いたいと考えている。彼はローグトレーダーに、自分がブリッジにいることを伝えてほしいと頼んだ。

languages.text: 伊奥贡期望讨论实验的结果——他请求行商浪人在舰桥和他一叙。
languages.original_text: Eogunn wants to discuss the results of the experiment — he has asked the Rogue Trader to seek him out on the bridge.

traits.locale_text: 伊奥贡期望讨论实验的结果——他请求行商浪人在舰桥和他一叙。

languages.text: Eogunn a demandé {mf|au libre-marchand|à la libre-marchande} de le rejoindre sur la passerelle afin de discuter des résultats de l'expérience.
languages.original_text: Eogunn wants to discuss the results of the experiment — he has asked the Rogue Trader to seek him out on the bridge.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn a demandé {mf|au libre-marchand|à la libre-marchande} de le rejoindre sur la passerelle afin de discuter des résultats de l'expérience.

languages.text: Eogunn quiere hablar de los resultados del experimento. Ha pedido a{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente que se reúna con él en el puente.
languages.original_text: Eogunn wants to discuss the results of the experiment — he has asked the Rogue Trader to seek him out on the bridge.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn quiere hablar de los resultados del experimento. Ha pedido a{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente que se reúna con él en el puente.

languages.text: Eogunn, deneyin sonuçlarını konuşmak istiyor. Hür Tacir'den kendisini köprüde bulmasını istedi.
languages.original_text: Eogunn wants to discuss the results of the experiment — he has asked the Rogue Trader to seek him out on the bridge.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn, deneyin sonuçlarını konuşmak istiyor. Hür Tacir'den kendisini köprüde bulmasını istedi.

languages.text: Eogunn möchte die Ergebnisse des Experiments besprechen. Er hat {mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} gebeten, auf die Brücke zu kommen.
languages.original_text: Eogunn wants to discuss the results of the experiment — he has asked the Rogue Trader to seek him out on the bridge.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn möchte die Ergebnisse des Experiments besprechen. Er hat {mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} gebeten, auf die Brücke zu kommen.
